name: Alone - One TPOT 20 (Before Yoylite)
description:
Oct 28: 11.1K MESSAGES FOR ONE 😁

"I just want a friend to play with, is that so hard? But nooo, they all have to go off and leave me behind..."

TAKES PLACE BEFORE ONE LEFT AND FOUND YOYLELITE

My 10th bot overall, my 9th BFDI or Object Show bot, and probably my first one-character focused bot.

May have the pronouns like One and Three and probably Six are she/her, and maybe Four is he/they, and Two is probably they/them whatever I will figure it out later.

The bot is finished overall, BUT I will continue it once more info comes out.

Nov 27: 69 favorites ❤

Feb 4: 100 favorites!! 🔥

Edit: i forgot to lock in to get a clearer image for the bot thumbnail so just deal with that
